creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
Telegram is transitioning to 64bit ids, and this is already happening:

https://t.me/tgbeta/4459

```
⚠️ TELEGRAM IS NOT DOWN

Telegram has migrated to 64-bit IDs. After updating Telegram, some users may have to wait a minute or two for their chat database to be optimized for 64-bits, but sometimes Telegram stuck on updating.

If your app is not updated:
1. You can send messages, but won't receive any of them.
2. You can't login using outdated app.

✅ SOLUTION
Update your app, or if you are using an outdated unofficial app then switch to the official app. telegram.org/apps
```

Current version in Q4 is not fresh enough to work. Please consider merging current Telegram version from stable to quarterly.
